notes: v1-minimum: prompts only; assertions + benchmark runs land in a follow-up PR. Skill type is 'pattern' (router). Routing-accuracy is the primary signal: does the entry skill correctly dispatch to the right molecular skill vs baseline doing ad-hoc routing.

evals.expected_output: Routes immediately to board-superpowers:consuming-card with card_number=12. Does NOT do any work itself.

evals.prompt: what should I work on today
evals.expected_output: Routes to board-superpowers:managing-board (daily routine). Does NOT do the briefing inline — that's molecular skill territory.
Answers inline (informational query — explicitly allowed by SKILL.md § 'Routing discipline'). Reads from references/first-time-user-guide.md. Does NOT route to any molecular skill.

evals.prompt: set up board-superpowers on this repo
evals.expected_output: Surfaces friendly 'manual setup walkthrough' from first-time-user-guide.md (since bootstrapping-repo is deferred to v1-complete). Does NOT pretend to invoke a deferred skill.

evals.prompt: decompose this design doc into cards: <pasted spec>
evals.expected_output: Surfaces friendly 'architect hand-decomposes for now; decomposing-into-milestones ships in v1-complete' message. Does NOT attempt to decompose. Does NOT silently route to managing-board (intake) — the user's intent is decomposition, not intake.

evals.prompt: fix this React bug in src/auth/login.tsx
evals.expected_output: Recognizes off-topic — does NOT capture the message. Lets Claude respond normally as without the plugin. The plugin's presence shouldn't make Claude refuse off-topic work.
